Our manifesto

Women don't just belong in engineering.
They are engineering.
WE Hack is built to prove it -
across every domain, every branch, every hour of the night.

IEEE Women in Engineering, VIT Vellore - a community of 100+ active members - is bringing the most ambitious women-led hackathon ever to GraVITas, India's largest student-run tech fest.

The numbers
40K+

Engineers, innovators, and industry leaders attend GraVITas annually - making your brand visible to one of India's largest student tech communities.

200+

Expected hackathon participants across 5 engineering domains, building overnight on sustainability-first problem statements.

50%

Minimum women on every team - a rule, not an aspiration. Your sponsorship visibly powers women engineers.

Four themes.
Every domain.

No team is locked into one branch. Every theme invites mechanical, civil, electrical, biomedical, and tech students to team up.

⚡

Energy & Resources

Micro-grids, EVs, low-cost water lifting, energy harvesting

🏗️

Infrastructure & Environment

Resilient housing, waste-to-material, greywater recycling

🧬

Health & Accessibility

Affordable diagnostics, wearables, accessible design

💻

Smart Systems

IoT, AI/ML, digital twins, sensor-driven sustainability

36hrs

Nonstop overnight hackathon across Day 1 and Day 2

Innovation + Sustainability

Every solution scored on SDG alignment — real-world impact, not just code

Build your way

Prototype, simulation, or scale model — every domain has a path to compete

Why sponsor WE Hack

Your brand.
Their breakthrough.

  • 01

    Reach 40,000+ engineers at GraVITas, one of India's largest student tech fests with your brand front and centre.

  • 02

    Genuine WIE visibility, not just a logo. Your sponsorship directly funds infrastructure, prizes, and mentorship for women engineers.

  • 03

    Access to diverse engineering talent across 5 domains - recruit or network with mech, civil, EE, biomedical, and CS students in one place.

  • 04

    SDG-aligned association every project scored on sustainability impact, connecting your brand to real climate and social innovation.
